programme.title: Long Island Medium: Dog Eat Dog Summer
programme.desc: Larry and Theresa continue celebrating their 25th wedding Anniversary. They decide to take a walk down memory lane and visit the oil company where they first met. At the office Theresa ends up reading the woman who holds the job SHE had 25 years ago.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Back to My Roots
programme.desc: Inspired by old scrapbooks uncovered by her Dad, Theresa goes to a genealogist to learn more about her family history, and receives some shocking news. And, Theresa gives a message from spirit to a devastated family that helps them to heal.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: A trip to the Busbys' old home brings a surprise. Adam's job situation faces a new development. Meanwhile, the Busbys brace for bad news at Hazel's eye appointment and Danielle and the Quants come up with a creative way to give back to the NICU.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Fournado Warning
programme.desc: It's birthday season in the Busby house! As the Quints turn four, Riley navigates her first day of Pre-K, Hazel adjusts to her big girl glasses, and the girls say goodbye to nighttime diapers. Adam's new job means major stress for Danielle.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Veggies...Ewww!
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle want the girls eating healthier, but the Quints aren't on board. The Busby's get surprising news about their house, forcing a big decision. Danielle dives into her new business and the family gets another visit from the Easter Bunny.

programme.desc: Adam and Danielle want the girls eating healthier, but the Quints aren't on board. The Busby's get surprising news about their house, forcing a big decision. Danielle dives into her new business and the family gets another visit from the Easter Bunny.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Angel and Jordan

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antoinette and Albert
programme.desc: When Antoinette meets a young rapper, the cyber attraction turns serious. After a year of talking on the phone and texting countless emoticons, Antoinette wants to take things to the next level.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Telizza and Shai
programme.desc: 18-year-old Telizza became bi-curious when her online friendship with Shai turned romantic. Frustrated by several failed attempts to video chat, Telizza has turned to Nev and Max to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Traves and Candy
programme.desc: Traves hopes for help with his internet girlfriend, Candy, which seems like a regular catfish. As the guys begin to learn more and more, they quickly realize there is far more to this catfishing story than it appears.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nique and Alice
programme.desc: Co-host popstar Elle King joins Nev to help Nique find her Tumblr love, Alice. Digging deep leads to more questions than answers as Nev and Elle have concerns about who Alice could be, and what her true intentions are with Nique.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Blaire and Markie
programme.desc: When Blaire's instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on and found a new girlfriend. But now Markie is back and wants to finally meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Mark's secret.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents are horrified to learn that they're sharing a suite at a resort for families where they've taken their respective kids on holiday.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tyreme and Tomorrow
programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over nine months ago. They share a deep bond and Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra and Emily
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and now she is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love with Emily is for real. Special guest Machine Gun Kelly teams with Nev to reveal a shocking Catfish.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana and Elijah
programme.desc: Solana wants to take her relationship with her boyfriend Danny to the next level but she can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah.

programme.desc: Law enforcement officers embark on a manhunt after the murder of a young couple. The search for the cold-blooded killer takes them across three states. In Cleveland, a man is shot in his own backyard.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Awogami Is Ripe
programme.desc: Find out what a compression trick is, what weapon Michael was surprisingly handed during filming and what prop melted in a production assistant's car.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cue Detective

programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Chimps of the Lost Gorge
programme.desc: A family lives in a deep, ancient forested gorge in Uganda, that runs through Africa's savannah, of which has been cut off from the rest of the jungle for 15 years.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham unlocks the secrets behind the world's weirdest events, from a bird-killing solar death ray to a monkey that's learned first aid.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: From his base in an abandoned town in the Nevada desert, host Chris Packham explores fascinatingly bizarre stories from around the world. In this episode, Chris uncovers the secrets of suspiciously fishy oil slick and what's making a lemming very angry.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Exploring everything from animal oddities to crazy weather, medical marvels and remarkable natural phenomena, host Chris Packham, uncovers the world's weirdest events, including a man who gets drunk without touching a drop of alcohol.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris unearths a whirlwind wedding ceremony, some exploding rocks and a woman's twin inside her brain.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham reveals how deadly poisonous frogs can saves lives, why we see faces in everything and how one woman's pants spontaneously burst into flame.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the mysteries behind a glacier that bleeds red, finds out how an electrician got tattooed by a lightning bolt and uncovers the remarkable story of a man with a tooth for an eye.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: Alexander the Great's Lost Tomb
programme.desc: New theories may help reveal the location of Alexander the Great's tomb after 2,000 years.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: The Real Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra is one of the ancient world's most famous and enigmatic figures; examination of her life and the city she built shows Cleopatra was not a temptress who ruled through seduction, but rather an intelligent leader and a canny politician.

programme.title: Egypt Unwrapped: Secrets of the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: The evolution of tomb building in the valley is explored with the latest technology.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin: El Dorado City of Gold
programme.desc: Albert Lin travels to Colombia to learn the truth behind the legends of El Dorado.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin: Ghost City of the Pacific
programme.desc: Albert Lin travels to Micronesia, in the Pacific Ocean, to uncover an ancient island city.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin: Stonehenge
programme.desc: Albert Lin uncovers what came before the world’s most famous prehistoric monument.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival WWII: Death in the Outback
programme.desc: Hazen Audel retraces the journey of 4 U.S. airmen who crashed in the remote Outback during WWII.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin: Stonehenge
programme.desc: Albert Lin uncovers what came before the world’s most famous prehistoric monument.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin: Ghost City of the Pacific
programme.desc: Albert Lin travels to Micronesia, in the Pacific Ocean, to uncover an ancient island city.

programme.title: Tomb of 1,000 Roman Skeletons
programme.desc: Beneath the streets of Rome, alongside one of the city's largest catacombs, a recently unearthed secret burial chamber holds one of Rome's most baffling secrets: a tomb containing roughly 1,000 skeletons, neatly stacked from floor to ceiling.

programme.title: When Rome Ruled: Doomsday Pompeii
programme.desc: Archaeologists use fresh evidence and the latest techniques to reconstruct the final hours of the doomed citizens of Pompeii, killed in one of the ancient world's most famous volcanic eruptions.

programme.title: When Rome Ruled: Secrets of the Gladiators
programme.desc: The ultimate Roman building; the first true sport stadium. We recreate when the colosseum first opened for business.

programme.title: When Rome Ruled: Killing Caesar
programme.desc: Julius Caesar masterminded his own unstoppable rise to power but was also the architect of his own downfall.

programme.title: When Rome Ruled: Birth of Rome
programme.desc: Using newly uncovered evidence, and new thinking, experts trace the evolution of the Rome, written in the stone of its ruins.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Sterling K. Brown

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Mel B

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Courteney Cox

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: James Marsden

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Marshawn Lynch
programme.desc: Plucked from a medieval tower along the Corsica coastline, Bear and Super Bowl Champion Marshawn Lynch are dropped deep in a rugged mountain range where they navigate cliffs, dark chasms and come face-to-face with the secretive French Foreign Legion.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild India: Tiger Jungles
programme.desc: Tucked away from the densely populated cities of India lies an ancient jungle where wildlife must battle to survive. This is the real story of the jungles of central India made famous by Rudyard Kipling’s 'Jungle Book.'

programme.title: Secrets of Wild India: Elephant Kingdom
programme.desc: Explore India's diverse landscape from 21,100 feet up in the Himalayas, where one of Asia's great rivers is fed by drops of melting ice. Meet the endangered one-horned rhinoceros, and learn why wild buffalo are one the country's most dangerous animals.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild India: Desert Lions
programme.desc: The desert of northwest India is one of the most challenging environments on the planet and is home to the Asiatic lion, one of the world's rarest big cats.

programme.title: Lion Kingdom: Blood Rivals
programme.desc: A male lion's reign is tested when a younger rival fails to follow the rules of the pride.

programme.title: Lion Kingdom: Hunter of Giants
programme.desc: Elephants in search of lions cross paths with hungry lions.

programme.title: Wild Cats of India: Masters of Disguise
Swamp Lions
programme.desc: A pride of lions is on its knees. Its mighty male was killed by poachers, leaving three mothers and their cubs vulnerable in one of the toughest landscapes in Africa.

programme.title: Lion Gangland
programme.desc: In a remote corner of the Serengeti, the 'Vumbi' lion pride battles high heat, shortages of food and water and a dangerous rival coalition in its struggle to survive.

programme.title: Birth of a Pride
programme.desc: Lions were near extinction in Selinda, but now their number has gone from two to over 60.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War on Asteroids
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting-edge technology to stop an asteroid apocalypse, and for the first time, mankind is closer than ever to keeping Earth safe from these killer space rocks.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroids: Worlds That Never Were
programme.desc: From icy worlds with more fresh water than Earth to flying mountains of pure metal, asteroids shaped our past and promise much for the future.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: We're only just developing instruments powerful enough to scan for aliens. One leading astronomer believes she may already have heard a hint of their first efforts to communicate.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: What Do Aliens Look Like?
programme.desc: Across the galaxy lie exotic worlds made entirely of water or stewing with poisonous gas. We can only speculate at what kinds of creatures inhabit these places.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: Is the Universe Alive?
programme.desc: The cosmos may be a super organism, a collection of separate bodies acting like a single being, or simple illusions we created.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: How Does the Universe Work?
programme.desc: There is a revolution of science underway that will transform life on Earth and ensure our survival as a species. If we can solve the equation of everything, we will have the keys of creation itself.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: Can We Survive the Death of the Sun?
programme.desc: We are all at the mercy of the Sun: someday, it will bathe us in a fiery, planetary holocaust. How can we survive the death of our star? The technology to move ourselves to Mars or another 'Earth' sounds like Sci-Fi, but almost within our grasp.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend erupts when SWAT is called in to subdue a home intruder, whose startling method of entry leaves the team scratching their heads. An alleged heroin dealer is scoped out by an officer who's on a mission to put him out of business.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Montana State Prison
programme.desc: Today, the state prison in Deer Lodge, Montana operates as both a ranch and a modern high-security prison but its legacy is dark and its history is marked by violent uprisings.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: The Big House: Auburn
programme.desc: The State Penitentiary in Auburn, New York is a monument to criminal rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: Leavenworth
programme.desc: An exclusive look at America's first federal prison. Operating since 1895, Leavenworth has had its share of notoriety - from The Birdman of Alcatraz and exciting escapes to bloody riots and escalating violence.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Family Ties
programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Terror in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In 1998, a gifted Philadelphia graduate student is found murdered in her bed. The hunt for her killer forces police to reevaluate a series of unsolved crimes, turning the city upside down.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Pvt. Tracie McBride has just arrived for military intelligence training when she's kidnapped from a laundry room at Goodfellow Air Force Base in Texas. A hunt for the missing soldier leads to a tale of horror involving a decorated war vet.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder On Newberry St.
programme.desc: In 1969 race riots in York, PA, claim two lives - an African-American mother of two and a young, white police officer. Their deaths are largely forgotten until 30 years later, when their cold cases are reopened, revealing the city's dark past.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Karrie's Choice
programme.desc: '48 Hours' tackles the question of whether one parent in a bitter custody battle could sway a teenager so strongly that they would help commit the murder of the other parent.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in East Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in East Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Karrie's Choice
programme.desc: '48 Hours' tackles the question of whether one parent in a bitter custody battle could sway a teenager so strongly that they would help commit the murder of the other parent.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Suburban Tragedy
programme.desc: In August 2008, newlywed Sarah Widmer died in one of two ways: either she was taking a bath and drowned, or her husband Ryan killed her. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva investigate to see if there's enough evidence to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Southern Justice
programme.desc: Rapper Mac Phipps was on the fast track to fame when a young fan was shot and killed at one of his concerts. Mac was convicted of the murder but his parents believe he's the victim of old fashioned southern justice.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: 20-year old Justin Newman lands a great job in construction, but when he disappears on the day his new boss is found brutally murdered, a nation-wide search for Justin uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Sensing Secrets
programme.desc: Young mother of three Christine Sheddy is trying to put her life back on track after tragedy and heartbreak. But just when she's on the verge of a fresh start, she disappears without a trace and every person in her life becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Happy Groom
programme.desc: Michael Reese, 40, is a good husband and loving son, who doesn't seem to have an enemy in the world. But when his wife Cindy comes home to find him shot dead, police must grapple with the secrets they uncover one of which led to his murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Target Justice
programme.desc: Investigating the attacks on a Texas prosecutor and district attorney who were both shot dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Justice for Sheila
programme.desc: A report on the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, the mother of quadruplets.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Beauty
programme.desc: An investigation into death of a Washington man and the trail that leads to Peggy Sue Thomas, a one-time Ms. Washington.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A teen girl forbidden from dating falls hard for an older man. In a desperate bid to be with him, she runs away from home. But young love soon turns to fatal obsession.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Girl with the Gold Earring
programme.desc: A young mom falls for a married military man after a chance meeting at his naval base.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Good Deed Punished
programme.desc: A Christian couple open up their home to a young woman in need of a helping hand. But their act of charity has unexpected consequences when emotional support gives way to physical attraction and a lustful affair turns deadly.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Toni Brattin Hair Fabulous: Wigs and Hairpieces
programme.desc: Wigs, hairpieces, and extensions for a great hair day.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rescuing a Massive Barn, Finishing the Lincoln Cabin
programme.desc: The guys rescue a huge double-pen barn in St. Meinrad, Indiana. It's the biggest dogtrot-style barn they've ever faced. They have to fight through modern layers of tin and barnwood to get to the incredible, pioneer-era handhewn beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bird's-Eye Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a massive double-pen barn in southern Indiana. While they work to save every log and barn board, Mark visits an incredible lodge built from a different barn they took down in nearby St. Meinrad.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Big Ol' Buckeye Cabin
programme.desc: The builders have never seen a log home as large as this Ohio cabin. They discovery it's filled with history, craftsmanship and a lot of cherished memories. Mark also gives the cabin owner tips on how to convert the bar into a modern home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Mary's Rectory
programme.desc: The team finds cast-iron mantles, a built-in cabinet, and a stained glass front doorway.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew salvage parts off a former navy ship, the USS Zuni/ USCG Tamaroa. Key finds include an officer's table, portholes, and wooden ship frames. At the warehouse, Mike builds a table from an airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Moneta Diner and Drive-in
programme.desc: The dawgs travel to Moneta, Virginia, to salvage a diner and drive-in that were destroyed by a fire. Their priorities include a kiosk booth and a mobile stage, but the large items require some maneuvering. Later, Mike builds a bar for the Stone House.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Weatherford Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs crew saves parts of a farmhouse in South Boston, VA. Key items include chairs, milk-painted paneling, and an arched window.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bemis Cotton Mill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage the Bemis Cotton Mill in Jackson, TN. Key finds include fire doors, earthenware sinks, factory carts, and a gang sink. At the warehouse, Mike builds a bookshelf using the panels from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods

programme.title: Amazing Space: Raising the Roof
programme.desc: Eric visits Trumbull, CT, where a gawky kitchen-garage transition room vexes a couple of homeowners. The team gets started by raising the flooring, installing a skylight, putting in new cabinetry and a bringing in a flat screen TV.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restored: The 1890 Yellow Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Brett strips away strange remodels and restores the beauty and functionality to a 1890s Victorian.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Keeping Morale Up
programme.desc: A new season of builders brave the Alaskan elements to construct off-the-grid cabins. Jeff Erickson takes on a challenging cliffside build, Chappie Cook's team struggles to get materials to the site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Progress Is Messy
programme.desc: A SkyCrane helicopter delivers a whopping 17,000 pounds of materials for Chris Sewell's cabin kit, Jeff Erickson fights the pouring rain and cold temperatures to stay on schedule.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Going Vertical
programme.desc: Chappie Cook's team runs into bears and sinking boats while hauling scaffolding materials. Jeff Erickson carefully begins to construct his slippery roof and Chris Sewell works tirelessly to install all the timber walls of his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain Gear Is Going On
programme.desc: Chappie's team struggles to lift 600-pound rafters onto the cabin's roof. Then, Chris works on drying in his cabin while Jeff begins installing his cabin's windows.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From West Coast to Wisconsin
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe starts the day off right with breakfast on a stick, and gets to down to business with the pink taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Crazy Cheesy
programme.desc: We're bringing you the ooiest and gooiest cheese dishes this country has to offer. From fried cheese curds in Wisconsin to lasagna grilled cheese in Cleveland, we're trying them all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson gears up for his favourite day of the week- cheat day! It's a full-on sugar and carb overload with everything from cakes to shakes.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Shark Sighting on the Cape
programme.desc: Debi Mazar takes her family to the Mayflower replica in Cape Cod, Mass., to show them a piece of their family history. They also have lunch at the Sunbird Food Truck, and go on Gabriele Corcos's planned adventure -- oyster farming!

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: The Love Boat in Portland
programme.desc: Debi Mazar and Gabriele Corcos take a weekend for themselves on the coast of Portland, Maine. For their romantic dinner on a houseboat, they pick up some lobsters, and a local snack, at a lobster shack and enjoy Maine cuisine at The Well at Jordan's Farm.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Hello, Dollywood
programme.desc: Debi Mazar is obsessed with Dolly Parton, so she, Gabriele Corcos, and their family head through the Smoky Mountains on their way to Dollywood. At Blackberry Farm, they're greeted with Southern hospitality and a Tennessee-style lunch.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Fear and Cooking in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: On the way to the Grand Canyon, Debi Mazar, Gabriele Corcos and family stop to pick local ingredients at Agritopia, eat where the locals do at Liberty Market, and attempt to fill their RV at one of the oldest gas stations around.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: A San Francisco Pop-Up Treat
programme.desc: The family is headed to Napa Valley to throw a pop-up party in a friend's vineyard. They stop in San Francisco to grab some salami and porchetta.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Seafood and Sasquatch in Seattle
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Debi Mazar, Gabriele Corcos and family are on the hunt for fresh seafood -- and Bigfoot! At the world-famous Pike Place Fish Market in Seattle, Gab tries his hand at the famous fish toss and grabs some lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Minneapolis for breakfast, lunch, a snack and dinner! Join him on this sweet and savory ride in his search for some of best deals on the best meals in Minneapolis!

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Austin
programme.desc: Ali reveal the best meals that Austin has to offer in a sweet and savory stop that includes: migas tacos at a popular roadside stop, authentic Texas barbecue, a buttery journey in baking and a Bayou experience straight from MawMaw's recipe book.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Boulder
programme.desc: Ali hits the ground running in Boulder at a diner with pancakes so manly, only a chef who moonlights as a strong man could make them. Ali then seeks out some of the most authentic Chinese noodles found on the West Coast.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chicago
programme.desc: Ali Khan's Windy City expectations are as high as Chicago's Willis Tower, so his breakfast is a tower of fried chicken, biscuits, egg and bacon. For lunch, Ali dives into the city's unofficial sandwich, the Italian beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Miami
programme.desc: Ali travels to Miami and breaks his fast with a classic Cuba staple: empanadas. He then samples some fruits of the sea, with right-off-the-boat mahi mahi sandwiches and a fisherman's stew.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Charleston
programme.desc: Ali heads south to Charleston and starts the day off right with creamy grits topped with all the morning classics. Then a crab cake sandwich that's the talk of the town, followed by seafood-stuffed hushpuppies.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Art of Darkness
programme.desc: Alton Brown delves into the dark world of chocolate.

programme.title: Good Eats: Orange Aid
programme.desc: Oranges aren't just for juice any more as host Alton Brown explores their symphony of flavours to create a classic drink, a tasty topping and a creamy cold dessert.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Melody

programme.title: Movie: Entertaining Christmas
programme.desc: A cookbook author's daughter is set to take over the family business. Only problem is, she can't cook. When she sees an online video asking for help, she is determined to change the family ways, and become known for helping in other ways.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Cartwright's
programme.desc: A single mom is unemployed and broke at Christmas. She is desperate to find a job in order to make her daughter's holiday a happy one.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Christmas
programme.desc: A resort developer heads to Christmas, Colorado, to scope out a new piece of land. While away, she has a minor car accident and meets the towns handsome sheriff, who helps her have a Christmas to remember.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Kellie Pickler from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'The Mistletoe Secret' and actress and comedian Vicki Lawrence stop by.

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Newlywed couple celebrates their first Christmas by inviting their families to join them. When he gets laid off and she finds out she is pregnant, they try and keep their secrets hidden to have a smooth holiday.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: A small-town factory, Aunt Sally's Christmas Cookie Company, is sold to large conglomerate. Their executive must seal the deal and shut down the factory, the town's lifeblood, but things become complicated when she meets the new owner.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cleveland gets a second chance at love when he reunites with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Turkey Pot Die
programme.desc: Cleveland takes a reluctant Cleveland, Jr. to a turkey farm in order to teach him how to hunt the family's Thanksgiving dinner, but Junior refuses to harm the innocent turkeys.

programme.title: The Office: Costume Contest
programme.desc: Michael freaks out when Darryl takes an idea to corporate over his head. Everyone in the office is in a competitive mood when the costume contest gets underway.

programme.title: The Office: Christening

programme.title: The Office: Viewing Party
programme.desc: Erin holds a 'Glee' viewing party at Gabe's house and invites the whole office over. Andy grows jealous of Gabe's relationship with Erin.

programme.title: The Office: WUPHF.com

programme.title: The Office: China

programme.title: The Office: Ultimatum

programme.title: The Office: The Seminar
programme.desc: When Andy's sales are at his lowest ever, he gets desperate to hold a small business seminar.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday High School Reunion
programme.desc: A woman returns home for Christmas just in time for her high school reunion.

programme.title: Movie: The Spirit of Christmas
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer heads to Vermont to broker the sale of an old inn. She learns it is haunted by a man who died 95 years ago. He takes human form every year exactly twelve days before Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A consultant is hired by a workaholic mother in an effort to get her through the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: All She Wants for Christmas
programme.desc: A young accountant dreams of moving to a big city, so to boost her resume, she tries to save an ornament company.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Family Secret
programme.desc: In 2012, Mark Staudte, a father and local musician, abruptly became ill. Nine months later his daughter suddenly became ill and was hospitalized in critical condition. Doctors wondered what was happening until one phone call changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Outbreak
programme.desc: Patients surface with similar symptoms and doctors have to act fast if they hope to save lives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Cold Case Shocker
programme.desc: Newlywed Sherri Rasmussen was found shot to death inside her Van Nuys, California home. For more than two decades, police pursued the theory that she was killed in a burglary gone wrong, until DNA evidence points to a suspect with a personal motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Shiner Standing
programme.desc: In the season finale, one moonshiner goes down as Tickle devises a bold but risky plan to sell Tim's shine. Josh and Bill's still site is compromised, while Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom brazenly run three stills. Finally, Deputy Sheriff Chuck makes his move.

programme.title: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Dave Turin takes a huge gamble. He bets his life savings that he, and his team of very inexperienced miners, will be able to mine gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment.

programme.title: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Chapter 3
programme.desc: The pressure beings to mount for Dave and his team of miners. Their mining hits a standstill and no one knows why.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Nome Strikes Back
programme.desc: When a fellow miner vanishes, Ken and Shawn interrupt their competing operations to join the search and rescue. Vern risks the Goldship while on the hunt for pay dirt and Emily races Mother Nature as the frigid end approaches with some dangerous winds.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Sneak Peek
Gold Rush: White Water: Golden Guys
programme.desc: In the Dakota Boys' second-year dredging for gold in McKinley Creek, the father and son team face extreme conditions diving for a big payday. When Dustin finds a hot spot, it forces him to re-evaluate everything.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Nome Strikes Back
programme.desc: When a fellow miner vanishes, Ken and Shawn interrupt their competing operations to join the search and rescue. Vern risks the Goldship while on the hunt for pay dirt and Emily races Mother Nature as the frigid end approaches with some dangerous winds.

programme.title: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Chapter 3
programme.desc: The pressure beings to mount for Dave and his team of miners. Their mining hits a standstill and no one knows why.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Boat Rescue Mission
programme.desc: While collecting coal on the beach after a storm, Eivin and Eve find a capsized boat and immediately begin looking for survivors. Otto, Charlotte and August build a shelter for their calves and Jane brings the family together with a new spring tradition.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: With predators stalking the homestead, the need for safe grazing land for cattle is greater than ever. Atz Sr and Atz Lee head to Perl Island to begin plans for new pasture, while Otto and Eivin set to work transporting a small herd to the island by boat.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer trek into the heart of Alaska to recover a plane that disappeared while carrying two American politicians. The brothers battle the elements and conquer glaciers as they attempt to solve the 47-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Vanished Confederate Treasure
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer head to Virginia in search of the long-lost Confederacy treasury. The brothers trek through the unforgiving terrain of the Appalachian Mountains in hopes of putting the 150-year-old mystery to rest.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: The Curse of El Dorado
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer are on the road to El Dorado. Using clues left behind by legendary explorer Percy Fawcett, the brothers head deep into the Amazon jungle to find key landmarks that could lead them to the lost City of Gold.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Lost Treasure of Panther Key
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer head to southwest Florida in search of the long-lost loot of pirate Jose Gaspar. The brothers leave no stone unturned as they hunt for the $30 million treasure said to be hidden somewhere along the coast.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Swift Silver
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer go on the hunt for legendary silver mine said to be worth tens of millions of dollars. A cryptic journal leads the brothers into the wilds of Kentucky before sending them out West in search of the long-lost treasure.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Aztecs in America
programme.desc: Brothers Casey and Chris Keefer trek through snow, slot canyons and relentless terrain in pursuit of a legendary Aztec treasure said to be hidden in the mountains of Utah.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Lost Race of Giants
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer travel to Ecuador to find a colony of giants. The brothers trek through the jungle, searching high and low for clues leading to the lost civilization.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Dutch Schultz's Missing Millions
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer are in upstate New York tracking down the lost fortune of Dutch Schultz. The brothers use Schultz's final words and a series of newspaper articles to guide them to where the notorious gangster may have buried his treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Japan's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh heads to Japan to explore the sunken ruins called Japan's Atlantis.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Kalahari Desert's Lost City
programme.desc: Josh traverses Africa's Kalahari Desert, looking for a fabled lost city.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Veggies...Ewww!
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle want the girls eating healthier, but the Quints aren't on board. The Busby's get surprising news about their house, forcing a big decision. Danielle dives into her new business and the family gets another visit from the Easter Bunny.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Not So Quiet Riot
programme.desc: When the Busbys agree to no more naps for the Quints, the results threaten to push Danielle to the edge as she deals with a house full of cranky 4-year-olds. Meanwhile, Adam and the girls try to come up with the perfect Mother's Day gift for Danielle.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quint Tested, Parent Approved
programme.desc: As the Quints prepare for end-of-the-year testing to determine their class placement next year, fears of Parker's anxiety return. Scheduling conflicts cause tension as the Busbys struggle to balance their growing businesses with their already busy lives.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Life with Quints: Big Decisions in the Big Country
programme.desc: It's Adam's birthday and the family is celebrating with a weekend trip at a Dude Ranch. The Busbys must make a difficult decision about the girls' schooling.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Raising Quints 101
programme.desc: The Busbys have become experts on parenting quintuplets, and are ready to teach the world.

programme.title: Counting On: Kendra's Got a Secret
programme.desc: Kendra surprises Joe when she finds out she's expecting baby number two! Jessa recruits her brothers to build a deck for her house before the new baby's arrival. While Jessa and Ben are at the doctor with Henry, the guys also babysit Spurgeon.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Meet the Plaths
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Big Decisions in the Big Country
programme.desc: It's Adam's birthday and the family is celebrating with a weekend trip at a Dude Ranch. The Busbys must make a difficult decision about the girls' schooling.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Big Decisions in the Big Country
programme.desc: It's Adam's birthday and the family is celebrating with a weekend trip at a Dude Ranch. The Busbys must make a difficult decision about the girls' schooling.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: You Have Been Loved Your Whole Life
programme.desc: Lisa faces many challenges when she helps a woman locate her father, starting with his identity. A woman seeks Chris's help to find her mother, hoping the similarities she read in her adoption paperwork aren't just a fantasy.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: 28 Foster Homes
programme.desc: Chris helps a woman locate her father after spending years being shuffled through 28 foster homes. Two radically different sisters, adopted into the same family, seek Lisa's help to find their biological mother.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quints on the High Seas
programme.desc: It's a dream come true for the Busby girls as the whole family goes on a Disney cruise but the cruise ship may not be ready for the Busbys. When Adam gets a huge job offer, it means major changes for the family, causing tension between him and Danielle.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Joyce and Aprille
programme.desc: Aprille works at an auto dealership and bribes her co-workers with snacks from her stockpile.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Tai and Tarin and Nathan
programme.desc: Twins Tai and Tarin get birthday freebies; Nathan prepares 1,000 military care packages.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Erin and Shavon
programme.desc: Erin only has $150 to feed 280 wedding guests at her little sister's wedding. Shavon's grandma left her a treasure trove of coupons with no expiration dates.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: April and Carla
programme.desc: April shops to feed 200 parishioners and her family for a month for under $100. Carla shops to feed 20 guests at her lake house.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Don't Give Up Your Day Job
programme.desc: Theresa was going to be a beautician if Spirit hadn't entered her life. After a trip to the barbershop with Larry, she decides to enroll in beauty school to test out her skills. Later, Theresa connects a woman with her son.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Getting the Band Back Together
programme.desc: Theresa's old band gets back together and performs for the first time in 30 years.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Spirit Roll
programme.desc: Theresa visits the house where she first saw Spirit. Then, she surprises a firefighter with a reading, but he fears his son won't come through. And, things turn competitive when Theresa and Larry take a sushi class.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Coach Theresa
programme.desc: Theresa and Larry visit the restaurant where they ate every day while they were dating, but spirit interrupts their lunch. Later, Theresa helps a woman let go of the anger she has surrounding her brother's death.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Bridesmaid Meltdown
programme.desc: A bridesmaid falls into a coma after drinking too much. A premature infant is abandoned at the hospital and must quickly be revived.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Couch Creature
programme.desc: A woman believes her neighbours want to kill her; a man is near death after an arrow pierces his chest; two women with swollen abdomens refuse to explain the cause of their pain.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: Gypsies Unleashed
programme.desc: As the road trip comes to an end, Robbie makes a surprise appearance in Tennessee. Back in Martinsburg, JoAnn and Sheena decide to plan a girl's day trip to a winery to keep the fun going. But no outing is complete without a dramatic Mellie outburst.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Buyer's Remorse
programme.desc: Trouble finds Danny when he makes a reckless buy at an auction.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Framed
programme.desc: Horny Mike discovers a coveted bike frame on private property and convinces Danny to risk it all by sneaking inside.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: Special Delivery
programme.desc: After blowing two sales, Danny finally gets to customize a 1960 Chevy Delivery the way he wants to. Then, Danny gets some bad news on a client and Mike goes head to horn with 2000 lbs. of angry bull.

programme.title: Counting Cars: McQueen for a Day
programme.desc: The guys try to take a beat up '68 Mustang Fastback and turn it into Steve McQueen's old "Bullitt" ride within Rick's modest budget.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: Old School
programme.desc: Shane's fiancée Tanya wants to return a favour by returning Shane's prized 1970 Mustang to its former glory. Later, Danny and Kevin find a rare Plymouth Roadrunner and help a portrait artist honour our fallen heroes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: Quadzilla
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin visit mad mechanic Gordon to see his latest insane creation. Later, Danny tries to turn a '34 Ford into a hot rod.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sharon Rides Again
programme.desc: A motorcycle-loving couple wants to hit the road again like they used to. Sharon hasn't been able to ride comfortably since she lost a leg, so it's up to Danny and the crew to build a bike that is comfortable, safe and as cool as the couple that's riding.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Major League Muscle
programme.desc: Rick looks to turn a 1962 mini-Corvette into a racing ragtop. A 1950s coin operated mustang ride hoofs it into the shop in the hopes that Rick can restore it.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: Dune Buggy Blues
programme.desc: Danny has found and bought a replacement for his beloved Dune Buggy 'Sparkles.' As the guys are turning it into the ultimate '70s beach fantasy, Mike convinces Ryan to take it for a quick joy ride that ends anything but joyful.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: I Want My Caddy Back
programme.desc: Danny gets a call from Kevin's brother, who wants to sell Danny a 1969 Cadillac, but they can't let Kevin know or else he'll never trust his brother or Danny again.

programme.title: Counting Cars: A Legend on Two Wheels
programme.desc: When Danny is asked to create a commemorative bike that honours music legend Les Paul, he has to pull out all the stops and hopes his team can get it done in 30 days. Horny Mike wants to impress Danny and looks at a 1940 Dodge that's for sale.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Stude-licious
programme.desc: Shannon turns to the shop for help when he takes on restoring a 1962 Karmann Ghia as an anniversary present for his wife. With the tables are turned, Shannon quickly learns that the customer isn't always right.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Twisted Chopper
programme.desc: Dee Snider from Twisted Sister drops by the shop to get a new ‘Sugar Bear’ front end put on his Von Dutch chopper. Danny makes a road trip to L.A. to pick up the front end, and hang with his old friend Sugar while he's there.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Harley and the Mystery Merc
programme.desc: Danny makes a plan to put the Count's Kustoms touch on a classic Harley Davidson that he hopes to sell for a big profit. But when the bike reaches Horny Mike the whole project is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bonneville Bound Part 1
programme.desc: The Turbinator, the vehicle holding a land speed record, needs a paint job to make it look as fast as it goes. Danny decides the crew should be there in Bonneville, Utah when it goes for the speed record again.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bonneville Bound Part 2
programme.desc: Ryan and Kevin go to the Bonneville Salt Flats to see The Turbinator try to break 500 MPH. Back at the shop, Davey Deals asks Danny to help him sell a classic 1951 Nash, and Mike and Paul trick out an electric bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Red, Hot and Dangerous

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Full Moon
